description: {"description": "Leaf surface exhibits a dense, powdery, white coating. The leaf blade appears otherwise generally intact in shape and venation, though obscured by the coating."} {"description": "No distinct lesions are visible. The primary symptom is a widespread, superficial growth covering the leaf surface. There is no evidence of tissue necrosis or chlorosis beyond what might be caused by the pathogen's presence."} The powdery growth is distributed extensively across the entire upper leaf surface, appearing relatively uniform in density. It is also visible on the petiole.
